Report.Name: Demand Forecast - Company
Report.Description: Informe de Demand forecast por empresa

With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT CompanyDemandForecast.[Week] AS [Week], {{ Fields -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: TotalStock --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions + CompanyDemandForecast.Receptions + --CompanyDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions + CompanyDemandForecast.Stock) AS TotalStock -Expression: Stock --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Stock) AS Stock -Expression: AccumulatedReceptions --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedReceptions) AS AccumulatedReceptions -Expression: Receptions --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Receptions) AS Receptions -Expression: Sales --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Sales) AS Sales -Expression: Breakage --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Breakage) AS Breakage -Expression: SimulatedReceptions --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.SimulatedReceptions) AS SimulatedReceptions -Expression: PointOfSaleDeliveries --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.PointOfSaleDeliveries) AS PointOfSaleDeliveries -Expression: Orders --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Orders) AS Orders -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple) AS OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacity --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.OrdersAdjustedToCapacity) AS OrdersAdjustedToCapacity -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance) AS OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance -Expression: Capacity --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.Capacity) AS Capacity -Expression: AccumulatedSales --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedSales) AS AccumulatedSales -Expression: AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries) AS AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries -Expression: AccumulatedOrders --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrders) AS AccumulatedOrders -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple) AS AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity) AS AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --SUM(CompanyDemandForecast.AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance) AS AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance }} FROM Fact.CompanyDemandForecast {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: CompanyDemandForecast -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ GroupBy -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Sql --CompanyDemandForecast.[Week] }}
With.Query: SELECT [Week], {{ Fields -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: TotalStock --TotalStock -Expression: Stock --Stock -Expression: AccumulatedReceptions --AccumulatedReceptions -Expression: Receptions --Receptions -Expression: Sales --Sales -Expression: Breakage --Breakage -Expression: SimulatedReceptions --SimulatedReceptions -Expression: PointOfSaleDeliveries --PointOfSaleDeliveries -Expression: Orders --Orders -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacity --OrdersAdjustedToCapacity -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance -Expression: Capacity --Capacity -Expression: AccumulatedSales --AccumulatedSales -Expression: AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries --AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries -Expression: AccumulatedOrders --AccumulatedOrders -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple --AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity --AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity -Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: TotalStock ---SUM(TotalStock) OVER() AS TotalTotalStock --Expression: Stock ---SUM(Stock) OVER() AS TotalStocks --Expression: AccumulatedReceptions ---SUM(AccumulatedReceptions) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedReceptions --Expression: Receptions ---SUM(Receptions) OVER() AS TotalReceptions --Expression: Sales ---SUM(Sales) OVER() AS TotalSales --Expression: Breakage ---SUM(Breakage) OVER() AS TotalBreakage --Expression: SimulatedReceptions ---SUM(SimulatedReceptions) OVER() AS TotalSimulatedReceptions --Expression: PointOfSaleDeliveries ---SUM(PointOfSaleDeliveries) OVER() AS TotalPointOfSaleDeliveries --Expression: Orders ---SUM(Orders) OVER() AS TotalOrders --Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple ---SUM(OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalOrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacity ---SUM(OrdersAdjustedToCapacity) OVER() AS TotalOrdersAdjustedToCapacity --Expression: OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance ---SUM(OrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance) OVER() AS TotalOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance --Expression: Capacity ---SUM(Capacity) OVER() AS TotalCapacity --Expression: AccumulatedSales ---SUM(AccumulatedSales) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedSales --Expression: AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries ---SUM(AccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedPointOfSalesDeliveries --Expression: AccumulatedOrders ---SUM(AccumulatedOrders) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedOrders --Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple ---SUM(AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToMinimunAndMultiple --Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity ---SUM(AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacity --Expression: AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance ---SUM(AccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance) OVER() AS TotalAccumulatedOrdersAdjustedToCapacityAdvance }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: Products -Sql: --[Week] }} {{Pagination}}
